blended.narrative: Mont-Sauvage (Owl's Head) is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.3 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 164 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: light rain showers, highs of 53°F.
Tuesday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 57°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
